GOcontext 0.1.0

    • Motivation
  • Reference
  • News

Restrict a GO graph to mapped GO terms

Source: R/filter_mapped.R
filter_mapped.Rd

Restricts a GO or GOSubgraph object to GO terms that have at least one mapped gene in the attached organism annotation.

The mapping must have been attached previously using attach_org(). The mapping itself is not modified; only the graph structure is restricted.

Usage

filter_mapped(go)

Arguments

go

A GO or GOSubgraph object with an attached organism mapping.

Value

A GOSubgraph restricted to GO terms with at least one mapped gene.

Examples

data("go_cc_ecoli", package = "GOcontext")

go_cc_ecoli_mapped <- filter_mapped(go_cc_ecoli)
go_cc_ecoli_mapped
#> An object of class "GOSubgraph"
#> Slot "ontology":
#> [1] "CC"
#> 
#> Slot "version":
#> [1] "3.22.0"
#> 
#> Slot "keep_ids":
#>   [1] "GO:0000015" "GO:0000345" "GO:0000408" "GO:0000428" "GO:0000786"
#>   [6] "GO:0000796" "GO:0000935" "GO:0002144" "GO:0002189" "GO:0002197"
#>  [11] "GO:0005576" "GO:0005615" "GO:0005667" "GO:0005694" "GO:0005737"
